= readsaber graph =

== Format ==
readsaber graph ?options? summaryfile result

== Description ==

Make a graph of all 

== Arguments ==
* summaryfile: A readsaber output summary file
* result: result file in png format with the graph

== Options ==
; -annotationfile filename: The reference annotation file, needed to consistently color elements over different file (currently obligatory)
; -usesimpleschema 0/1: default is to use the full schema with stramd (in column schema), set to 1 to use the 
simpleschema field that does not have strand in the schema
; -specialelements list: list of elements/ids in the summary that cannot be deduced from the annotation file (added using the -refseq and -refseqannot options)

== Category ==
graph
